mapper.select:
SELECT eduChapterExamPaper.* , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterExamPaper.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduCourseChapter.course_id = eduCourse.id
ORDER BY eduChapterExamPaper.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterExamPaper.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduCourseChapter.course_id = eduCourse.id

SELECT eduChapterExamPaper.* , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterExamPaper.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduCourseChapter.course_id = eduCourse.id
ORDER BY eduChapterExamPaper.create_time DESC

SELECT eduChapterExamPaper.* , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterExamPaper.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduCourseChapter.course_id = eduCourse.id WHERE eduChapterExamPaper.id = #{id}
